FGO-COMMAND_SPELL.text_0:
Noble Phantasm Release: Gain 100% Noble Phantasm Gauge. 
 Activated by using 1 Command Spell.
FGO-COMMAND_SPELL.text_1:
Spiritron Repair: Restore 30 HP. 
 Activated by using 1 Command Spell.
FGO-COMMAND_SPELL.text_2:
Spiritron Restoration: Survive fatal damage and restore all HP. 
 Gain 300% Noble Phantasm Gauge. 
 Activates when you are about to be defeated, consuming 3 Command Spells.
FGO-NOBLE_PHANTASM.text_0: When Noble Phantasm Gauge reaches 100%, click to select a Noble Phantasm card to add to your hand, and reset your Noble Phantasm Gauge.
FGO-NOBLE_PHANTASM.text_1: When Noble Phantasm Gauge exceeds 100%, upgrade the selectable Noble Phantasm card for each 100% exceeded.
FGO-MYSTIC_CODE.text_0:
Shining Accompaniment: Gain {M:diff()} Critical Stars. 
 Gain {NP:diff()} % Noble Phantasm Gauge. Cooldown: 8 turns
FGO-MYSTIC_CODE.text_1: Pure Combination: Gain Invincible 2 times this turn. Cooldown: 8 turns
FGO-MYSTIC_CODE.text_2:
Happy Regeneration: Gain 2 Energy. 
 Draw 2 cards. Cooldown: 8 turns
FGO-MYSTIC_CODE.text_3:
Prediction Calculation: Discard 1 card. 
 Select 1 card from draw pile and add to your hand. 
 Added in Act 2. Cooldown: 8 turns
FGO-NOBLE_DECK_PANEL_ITEM.text_1: You can view currently unlocked Noble Phantasm cards. More Noble Phantasm cards will be unlocked as you explore the Spire.
FGO-NOBLE_DECK_VIEW_SCREEN.text_0: These cards will be retained and removed from combat after being played.
